_comment: SessionStart 自动拉起本地 Bridge（需环境变量 CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN；禁止写死 token）。omni_powers heavy 工作流已归档（见 docs/archive/omni_powers/_ARCHIVED.md），相关 hooks 与 env 已移除。

hooks.command: bash -c 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; [ -n "${CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN:-}" ] || exit 0; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:17831/health 2>/dev/null | grep -q 200 && exit 0; [ -f "$root/artifacts/bridge/bridge.mjs" ] || exit 0; CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN="${CAPTURE_ALL_BRIDGE_TOKEN:-}" nohup node "$root/artifacts/bridge/bridge.mjs" --port 17831 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
